modified_text: Per the company's fiscal 2023 annual report, costs of the total program are between $0.9 billion - $1.0 billion and the program is expected to be substantially completed by the end of fiscal year 2026.
claim: In its fiscal 2023 annual report, the company disclosed that the restructuring program would cost between $0.9 billion and $1.0 billion and be substantially completed by the end of fiscal year 2026.
citation_as_written: Pfizer Inc., Annual Report on Form 10-K for fiscal year 2023, Notes to Consolidated Financial Statements — Restructuring.
notes: Text restates the passage faithfully, but the cited source year is wrong: this disclosure appears in the fiscal 2025 10-K (period ended Dec 2025), not a fiscal 2023 report. Real URL retained; attribute-level (fiscal year) corruption. Served filing is actually J&J jnj-20251228.
